# Guelph Lawn Care — Lawn Care Leads, Guelph, Ontario

> Connects Guelph, Ontario homeowners needing lawn mowing, fertilizing, aeration, or overseeding with a single vetted, exclusive local lawn care provider. Part of the WeProvideLeads network of local-service lead generation sites serving Guelph, Ontario, Canada.

This site is a lead-generation and referral service, not a lawn care company itself. Requests submitted through the contact form are matched with one qualified, exclusive lawn care contractor serving the area. Licensed pesticide applicators; weed control follows Ontario's Cosmetic Pesticides Ban framework.

## Services
- Lawn Mowing
- Fertilizing & Weed Control
- Core Aeration
- Overseeding
- Fall Cleanup
- Full-Season Lawn Care Programs

## Service area
Guelph, Fergus, Elora, Rockwood, Erin, Acton, Puslinch, Cambridge, Wellington County

- Home: https://guelphlawncare.ca/
- Services: https://guelphlawncare.ca/#services
